subject: FW: Saturday Brunch at the BWC
body:
FYI 
Yoed performing this Sat April 12th ay Bowery Wine Co 1230-4pm
Please see address below.
Thanks,
Joanne


-----Original Message-----
From: CSILEO24@aol.com

Date: Tue, 8 Apr 2008 11:52:32 
To:chrisapostle@hoffmanentertainment.com
Cc:Amy.Bender@morganstanley.com, DarrinBro@aol.com, Chris.Hackett@sprint.com,       PCohen@TNSJ-LAW.COM, Gaslight93@aol.com, Micheledaprix@yahoo.com,       Lumos2010@aol.com, FARAN123@aol.com, cwragg@twrgrp.com, gz@zagoren.com,       ray.javdan@gmail.com, 4korners@optonline.net, LGesser@aol.com,       jlewis10028@yahoo.com, Losskate@aol.com, Hershy61@aol.com,       TinaKromer@aol.com, Lovematza@aol.com, EZDEL@aol.com
Subject: Saturday Brunch at the BWC


Laura and I will be at the Bowery Wine Company this Saturday to try our new brunch menu and see Cellist Yoed Nir from the Israeli philharmonic perform. 
  
Please let me know if you would like to join us-12:30ish. 
  
  
Chris Sileo
Bowery Wine Company
13 East 1st Street, NY, NY, 10003
212-614-0800
